this file will be rewritten in
theirs, and its contents will be
duplicated in another file.
but it will not be eligible for
rename detection.

note that is has also been edited
in the ours branch

theirs, and its contents will be
duplicated in another file.
but it will not be eligible for
rename detection.

rename detection.

rename detection.
